title: Restorology Baby Moses Basket Mattress, Extra Thick Super Soft Oval Shaped Double Sided Hypoallergenic Mattress Fits Mamas & Papas Mothercare With Removeable Quilted Cover (70 x 30 x 4 cm)
features: * ✅ * MATERIAL: These Moses Basket Mattresses are 100% Pure, Super Soft, Breathable, Piece Quilted Foam, adding extra soft support for soft skins and gentle bodies of toddlers and babies.
* ✅ * REMOVEABLE COVER: These hypoallergenic mattresses comes with a removable quilted cover. These covers are stitched strongly to ensure the softness and long lasting durability.
* ✅ * MADE FOR SAFER SLEEP: Tested to the highest British Standards for flammability, performance and safety.

* ✅ * EASY TO CLEAN: Mattress foam can be quickly cleaned with clean damp cloth. Please allow the mattress to dry fully before re-use For extra durability and comfort air the mattress and turn the mattress frequently Textile Care Label for Cover.
* ✅ * Moses Basket Mattress, Pure White Quilted, Made in England to UK safety Specifications. Excellent Quality
description: Product description Ideal & Skin Friendly: The mattress is quiet and thick so there aren't any strange crinkly sounds that will frighten and wake up the sleeping baby. This mattress is made with medium firmness. Our Moses mattress is made from 100% quality material. The Oval shape mattress provides an ideal & deep comfortable sleep. Easy to clean, carry and also a great choice for your newborn’s sensitive skin. Protective Inner Material: Restorology Moses Basket Mattress provides a deep & comfortable sleep. The water-resistant fitted bassinet size mattress has a top layer of 100% comfort foam all-over pattern for the baby's happiness. Amazingly quiet, breathable and stretchy, ideal for baby’s sensitive skin. Mattress Features Waterproof (fabric cover is waterproof)Cover is also Quilted / increases Baby's comfortable sleepDouble Stitched inside out / Over-Locked StitchingPure Foam Mattress (NO Hazardous Springs)Air PermeableBreathable mattressAnti-Dust mite25-28 grade safe baby foamHypo Allergic [no springs means no bed bugs]Removable / Washable Cover Sizes Available: 65 x 28 x 4 cm66 x 28 x 4 cm67 x 30 x 4 cm70 x 30 x 4 cm71 x 40 x 4 cm74 x 28 x 4 cm74 x 30 x 4 cm74 x 33 x 4 cm74 x 35 x 4 cm75 x 28 x 4 cm75 x 32 x 4 cm76 x 40 x 4 cm80 x 30 x 4 cm80 x 40 x 4 cm PACKAGE INCLUDE: 1 x Moses Basket Mattress Safety Warning Tested to British standards for flammability, performance and safety. Hypoallergenic mattress.
